## Checklist

- [ ] Shell scripts include `set -euo pipefail`
- [ ] New skills have a `SKILL.md` with proper frontmatter
- [ ] New agents have a `.md` with proper frontmatter
- [ ] New hooks are registered in `hooks/hooks.json`
- [ ] Tests added for new hook scripts
